chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.519 of 2024 (Mst. Sabal v. The State and others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on MA No.6436/24 2. For orders on office objection & reply of Adv at flag A 3. For orders on MA No.6437/24 4. For hearing of main case 22.05.2024 Mr. Qadir Hussain, advocate for the applicant ========= 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Karachi, Malir, besides granting protection in favour of the applicant ought to have directed the police to record her FIR for making tress pass into the house of the applicant using criminal force with a threat to dispossess her there from. There is a dispute between the parties over the possession of the house. If the applicant has a feeling that a cognizable offence has taken place, and for that, her FIR is not being recorded by the police then she has an alternate and adequate remedy to exhaust by filing a direct complaint of the incident. No illegality is noticed in the impugned order which may justify this Court to interfere with the same. Consequent to the above discussion, the instant Crl. Misc. Application; it is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nadir*
